title: Custom-MojangLogo
description: Texture to customize mojang logo on loading screen.Works with most versions of Puzzle or OptiFine.
body:
## Texture to customize mojang logo on loading screen.
**Works with most versions of Puzzle or OptiFine.**
## Required:[Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle) or [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads)
![loading](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/j8nnpgro/images/ef318e8e9c6bf25cb53d992a0e06ed7232f15d49.png)
## Other Textures
- **[3D-EndCrystals](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-end-crystals)**
- **[Black TNT](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/black-tnt)**
